slides.title: Handcrafted Fashion for Every Occasion
slides.description: Explore our exclusive collection of handcrafted clothing and accessories designed to add elegance, confidence, and timeless style to your everyday look. From artisan-crafted outfits to unique printed pieces, discover fashion made to stand out.

slides.title: Printed Fashion with Timeless Charm
slides.description: Upgrade your wardrobe with printed and handcrafted fashion pieces made for everyone who loves sophisticated style. Perfect for casual wear, special occasions, and everyday looks — crafted with passion and premium-quality artistry.

slides.title: Modern Fashion Inspired by Artistry
slides.description: Discover handcrafted clothing and accessories designed with creativity, elegance, and modern fashion trends in mind. Every piece blends artistic design with timeless sophistication — made for men and women who wear fashion with intention.

aboutUs.title: About DesigNagArtistry
aboutUs.description: At Designagartistry, fashion is not simply worn — it is felt. Born from a deep reverence for Pakistan's artisanal heritage, we craft every piece as a conversation between tradition and the contemporary woman. Our atelier brings together master craftspeople, hand-selected fabrics, and runway-inspired silhouettes to create handcrafted couture that endures beyond seasons. We believe that true luxury lives in the details — a perfectly placed tonal stitch, a silhouette that moves with grace, a fabric that whispers quality before you even touch it. From intimate gatherings to grand occasions, Designagartistry dresses the woman who does not follow trends. She defines them. This is premium women's fashion Pakistan has been waiting for.

items.quote: The clothing designs are absolutely stunning and beautifully crafted. Every piece feels premium, elegant, and perfect for both casual and formal wear. I love the unique artistic touch in every collection.
items.author: Hana Kimusaki

items.quote: Amazing quality, elegant packaging, and timeless designs. DesigNagArtistry offers handcrafted fashion that truly stands out. I always receive compliments whenever I wear their pieces.
items.author: Marium Anny

collections.title: Our Collections: From Runway Silhouettes to Festive Formals
collections.luxePret: Effortless to wear, impossible to overlook. Our luxury pret wear Pakistan line reimagines everyday dressing through contemporary separates and perfectly matched co-ord sets. Each pairing is crafted for the modern woman — polished enough for a luncheon, expressive enough for a soirée. Mix, layer, and make it yours.
collections.festiveFormals: When the occasion calls for something extraordinary, our festive formals deliver. Rendered in premium luxury lawn and adorned with delicate tonal embroidery and intricate schiffli cutwork, these pieces capture the spirit of celebration with refined subtlety. Colour, craft, and culture — woven into every thread.
collections.couture: For moments that demand nothing less than perfection. Our designer ethnic wear couture line features structured Kalidaars with architectural precision, contemporary Pishwas that drape like a second skin, and evening silhouettes rendered in luminous tissue silk. This is modern ethnic couture elevated to pure artistry.

artistry.title: The Artistry Behind the Design
artistry.description: Every Designagartistry creation begins long before the first stitch. It begins with an idea — a texture, a story, a woman. Our in-house artisans work with heritage embroidery techniques alongside modern pattern-making to ensure that each garment is a wearable work of art. We source only the finest materials, refuse to rush our process, and hold each piece to an uncompromising standard. The result is fashion that feels as exceptional as it looks. Your next signature look is waiting. Step into a world where festive formals meet flawless construction, and where every fabric tells a story worth wearing. Browse our latest collection and discover the piece that speaks your name.
